positive: A vibrant, abstract jungle scene silhouette, featuring stylized tropical leaves, winding vines, and exotic flora. The composition must be central and perfectly balanced for apparel printing. Use strong, deep emerald and jungle green tones, contrasted with burnt orange and gold accents for highlight elements. Style: Highly detailed graphic vector art meets Alphonse Mucha's intricate botanical elegance. Lighting: Studio flat lighting to ensure clean edges and silhouettes. Composition: Radial symmetry focusing on the jungle heart. Must be highly suitable for screen printing on fabric.
negative: blurry, low detail, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, signature, out of focus, bad anatomy, distorted, extra limbs, noise, jpeg artifacts
